description: Validation, diagnostics, security boundaries, observability, automated tests, manual checks, and rollout gates for Workflow UI Authoring V2.

userStories.title: Define shared V2 diagnostic shape and grouping
userStories.description: As a workflow author, I need consistent diagnostics so that errors are actionable across catalog, builder, publish, session creation, and start.
acceptanceCriteria: Diagnostics include code, message, optional path, optional nodeId, optional edgeId, severity, and hint where applicable
Diagnostics group by workflow, node, edge, schema path, state path, registry ref, and severity
Diagnostic data can be consumed by Workflow Library, Builder, Project session creation, run start, and runtime failure states
Tests pass
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Implemented shared V2 diagnostic report/grouping helpers and registry/state annotation fields in workflow diagnostics.

userStories.title: Implement validation trigger pipeline
userStories.description: As a developer, I need validation to run at every lifecycle boundary so that invalid definitions do not reach execution.
acceptanceCriteria: Validation runs after draft load, graph edit, node edit, edge edit, schema edit, prompt edit, state edit, and raw IR edit
Validation runs before publish, before Project session creation, and before workflow start
Draft save allows diagnostics, but publish and run/start reject error diagnostics
Tests pass
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Implemented Chat Web V2 validation triggers for draft load, draft edit/save, explicit validate, publish blocking, Project session creation, and start-boundary validation.

userStories.title: Enforce registered-capability security boundary
userStories.description: As a security reviewer, I need UI authoring to compose only registered refs so that users cannot create arbitrary executable code.
acceptanceCriteria: UI workflows can reference only registered handlers, adapters, guards, workflows, human actions, prompt assets, and non-archived Agent profiles
The UI does not create handlers, adapters, guards, JavaScript, TypeScript, shell, eval, or arbitrary executable nodes
Hidden LLM coercion between incompatible schemas is not used as a substitute for registered adapters
Tests pass
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Implemented registered-ref validation for handlers, adapters, guards, nested workflows, human actions, prompt assets, and non-archived Agent profiles; added visible UI security-boundary copy and web-channel coverage for inline executable and hidden LLM coercion rejection.

userStories.title: Add lifecycle observability signals
userStories.description: As an operator, I need lifecycle and failure signals so that V2 behavior is inspectable and debuggable.
acceptanceCriteria: Lifecycle event or audit-equivalent records exist for draft save, validation, publish, archive, and delete
Lifecycle event or audit-equivalent records exist for configured-session creation, run start accepted, run start blocked, run status changes, and human action submission
Run inspection surfaces start failures and blocked-start diagnostics with the same diagnostic families as API responses
Tests pass
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Implemented durable Chat Web workflow lifecycle events for draft save, validation, publish, Project workflow-session creation, start accepted, and start blocked; Project run inspection now surfaces blocked-start diagnostics from lifecycle events.

userStories.title: Apply diagnostic redaction and visibility rules
userStories.description: As a privacy reviewer, I need diagnostics to be useful without leaking hidden workflow data.
acceptanceCriteria: Diagnostics reveal ids, paths, and locations needed to fix errors
Diagnostics do not dump sensitive prompt, input, output, state, edge payload, or human action payload data in normal UI
Run and diagnostic visibility follows existing Project/session access rules
Tests pass
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Implemented normal-UI diagnostic sanitization/redaction and enforced owner-scoped Project, draft, and lifecycle diagnostic visibility.

userStories.title: Add negative tests for explicit V2 deferrals
userStories.description: As a QA engineer, I need tests for non-goals so that unsupported authoring paths do not appear accidentally.
acceptanceCriteria: Tests assert no inline TypeScript, JavaScript, shell, eval, or arbitrary executable code path exists in V2 UI
Tests assert no raw XState editing, Zod schema authoring, templates, workflow slash commands, or workflow tools for agents are exposed
Tests assert YAML/JSON import/export and TypeScript export are absent as V2 product features
Tests pass
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Added source-level UI negative tests for explicit V2 deferrals, covering visible scope-boundary copy and ensuring interactive Workflows/Project controls do not expose deferred inline executable, raw XState, Zod, workflow template/slash-command/tool, product import/export, or TypeScript export actions.

userStories.title: Add V2 automated release test suites
userStories.description: As a release reviewer, I need test coverage mapped to the main V2 areas before deployment.
acceptanceCriteria: Unit tests cover registry draft/publish lifecycle, catalog APIs, source/status action derivation, validation diagnostics, version bumps, archive, and delete
Integration tests cover Project session workflow selection, delayed start, snapshot creation, workflow immutability, one-run enforcement, and start validation
UI tests cover duplicate/edit/validate/publish, raw IR invalid warning, incompatible edge adapter requirement, missing refs, sidebar/view routing, and human action submission
Tests pass
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Document rollout gates and manual validation flow
userStories.description: As an implementation lead, I need release gates so that V2 ships only after automated and manual checks pass.
acceptanceCriteria: Document MVP, v1.1, v1.2, and release gates for V2 validation
Document the manual smoke flow for select-configure-save-start-inspect and duplicate-edit-validate-publish
Release gate requires relevant workflow/package and Chat Web tests plus typecheck
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Documented the V2 rollout gate matrix and canonical manual validation flows for Project execution and Builder authoring.
